# dax-default.xml is volume leveler disabled

# dax-default.oneplus is the same as dax-default.xml
# but headphone and bluetooth data are set the same as
# oneplus_bluetooth_enhancer data

# dax-default.oneplus_zw is the same as dax-default.xml
# but headphone and bluetooth data are set the same as
# oneplus_bluetooth_enhancer_zw data

# dax-default.bass_ is the same as dax-default.oneplus but
# more bass enhancer boost value

# dax-default.orig_bug is original with volume leveler
# enabled but has bass enhancer toggle bug at custom
# preference

# dax-default.orig_fix is original with volume leveler
# enabled and bug fixed

# you can rename any dax-default extension to
# dax-default.xml in order to use another modded
# settings. Rename another .xml to .mod.
